productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Football Hard Ground White Black Shoe
description: Designed for fast firm-ground play, the adidas f5 TRX FG soccer cleat is designed for those who love a rough challenging game. Lightweight and replete with anti-microbial technology, these shoes make for a great lifestyle footwear as well.UpperLightweight, easy-to-clean synthetic upperAsymmetrical loop lacing for better ball contactAgION anti-microbial treatment stops bad odour and prevents bacterial infectionsAdidass trademark three lines across the sides for enhanced she structure and signifying it’s motto of performance, perseverance and achievement Padded collar for snug FitMidsoleDie-cut EVA insole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTRAXION FG outsole for grip and comfort on firm natural surfacesOutsole studded with strong rubber cleats for enhanced balance and better strikeWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
